creator: jim@phrantic.phear.net
text:
On Sun, 31 Jan 1999, Kris Kennaway wrote:

> On Sun, 31 Jan 1999 jim@phrantic.phear.net wrote:
> 
> > >Synopsis:       new port: wmdate-0.3
> 
> 0.5 is out - I whipped up a quick port myself earlier this
> afternoon, but looks like it's vanished from my HD. It compiled just
> as easily as 0.3 seems to, so it should be just a matter of changing
> the md5 and distname.
>

Please close the original PR (ports/9834).  I'll submit the updated
port today since it hasn't been committed yet.

Kris, thanks for the info on the update.
